meta.title: Ransomware in ICS ... It Begins
meta.description:
Marcelo Branquinho of TiSafe presented two actual cases of ransomware in ICS in Brazil at the S4x17 event.

Case 1 is at 7:15 and hit a furniture manufacturer. There is a great Brazilian tv video story on this incident (with English subtitles). Case 2 is at 10:45 and is an electric company in Brazil.

The chart at 1:37 in the video is very interesting. It shows a huge spike in ICS malware incidents in Brazil in 2015. (2016 numbers were not yet available.)
